title: coleus forskalaei
intro: Coleus forskalaei, also known as Forskohlii, is a plant-based herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The medicinal properties of Coleus forskalaei are attributed to its high content of forskolin, a labdane diterpenoid compound that has been shown to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Coleus forskalaei include weight loss, improved cardiovascular health, and increased testosterone levels in men, making it a popular herbal supplement. Coleus forskalaei is typically prepared as a capsule or tablet, and some herbal teas and extracts are also available, although the effectiveness of these preparations may vary depending on the quality and concentration of forskolin.
